# `wait`

Wait for a specified amount of time. Use when you see a loading screen — prefer this over
pressing the back button.

## Source

- Kind: class-backed
- Class: `xyz.block.trailblaze.toolcalls.commands.WaitForIdleSyncTrailblazeTool`

- Recordable: yes (`is_recordable: true`)
- Host-only: no (`requires_host: false`)

## Input schema

### Optional parameters

- `timeToWaitInSeconds` — `Integer`
  Unit: seconds. Default Value: 5 seconds.
